value.string: Author, Description and Change History Section
Before creating any Bot, this bot is used as a template with all coding standards.
Move to the required Page Number
To get Empty record of Candidate Sheet where Extracted data will be putted.
Assigning number of candidates to be extracted from a page
Loop on each candidate in a page
Remove first 4-5 items from list as it has been consumed
Calculate Number of section does not exist in candidate info
Logic to extract candidate info from inner text

value.expression: select ltrim(rtrim(Name))+ltrim(EducationQualification) as CandidateKey  from [dbo].[HR_tblCandidateInfo] where ltrim(rtrim(Name))+ltrim(EducationQualification)='$strExistedCandidates$' and DATEADD(d,-180,getdate())<getdate()

select ltrim(rtrim(Name))+substring(EducationQualification,len(ltrim(rtrim(EducationQualification)))-$numEducationRightLength.Number:toString$,$numEducationRightLength.Number:toString$) as CandidateKey from [dbo].[HR_tblCandidateInfo] where ltrim(rtrim(Name))+substring(EducationQualification,len(ltrim(rtrim(EducationQualification)))-$numEducationRightLength.Number:toString$,$numEducationRightLength.Number:toString$)='$strExistedCandidates$' and DATEADD(d,-180,getdate())<getdate()
